setup.note: Official Exa-hosted remote MCP server. No API key is required for the free/default search tools. Add an Exa API key for higher limits or usage-based Agent tools. Exa recommends the x-api-key header rather than query-string secrets. Optional tools can be enabled with the tools query parameter, for example ?tools=web_search_exa,web_fetch_exa,agent_tools. Reference: https://exa.ai/docs/reference/exa-mcp

inputs.label: Exa API Key
inputs.description: Optional Exa API key for higher limits or Agent tools.
